title: Introducer Based Enrollment
description: A recognized introducer can support Aadhaar enrollment where standard identity or address documents are not available.

edges.legal_basis: Introducer certification for residents without standard documents
edges.regional_notes: Works best when the introducer is attached to an active enrollment centre.

title: ASHA Community Verification
description: ASHA worker knowledge can establish community identity and link the person to an introducer route.

edges.legal_basis: Community health worker verification of residence and identity
edges.regional_notes: Attach ASHA ID and local health register references where available.

edges.legal_basis: Affidavit supports referral to designated introducer
edges.regional_notes: Prefer notarized affidavit in urban districts.

title: School Record as Identity Support
description: A government school record or teacher verification letter can support identity for children and young adults.

edges.legal_basis: School-issued record confirms name, approximate age and guardian details
Institutional identity record accepted as supporting identity evidence
edges.regional_notes: Carry the original school register extract if possible.

title: Employer Verification for Migrant Workers
description: Employer verification can support current residence and identity for migrant workers.

edges.legal_basis: Employer confirms workplace, period of engagement and current location
edges.regional_notes: Add GST/license number if the employer has one.

edges.legal_basis: Workplace-linked certification supports local address pathway
edges.regional_notes: May need additional neighbour statement in informal settlements.

title: Head of Family Enrollment
description: A family member with Aadhaar can support enrollment through Head of Family linkage.

edges.legal_basis: Head of Family confirms relationship for Aadhaar enrollment
edges.regional_notes: Carry family member Aadhaar and relationship statement.

title: Neighbour Residence Affidavit
description: A known neighbour can support local residence through a community affidavit.

edges.regional_notes: Use two neighbour witnesses for higher confidence.

edges.legal_basis: Affidavit can supplement missing address documents
edges.regional_notes: Attach ration shop or shelter certificate when available.

title: Gazetted Officer Certificate
description: Certification by a gazetted officer can create a stronger fallback route when community documents are weak.

edges.regional_notes: Useful escalation path for homeless and stateless residents.
Block or tehsil office seal should be visible.

title: Document to Aadhaar Bridge
description: Identity and address proof together form the standard enrollment path.

edges.legal_basis: Accepted proof of identity for Aadhaar enrollment
edges.regional_notes: Pair with address proof at the enrollment centre.

edges.legal_basis: Accepted proof of address for Aadhaar enrollment
